resume.title: Senior Software Engineer
resume.headline: Backend & distributed systems engineer with 5+ years building high-scale APIs
resume.summary: Software engineer with 5+ years of experience building high-scale distributed systems and APIs. Proven track record of owning product surfaces end-to-end at growth-stage companies, from architecture through deployment. Deep background in payments infrastructure, developer tooling, and data pipelines.

mock-tailoring-1.title: Senior Software Engineer
mock-tailoring-1.generated_output:
## Why Alex Chen is a Strong Fit for Senior Software Engineer at Stripe

Alex Chen brings a rare combination of payments infrastructure depth, distributed systems experience, and proven ownership at scale — precisely the profile Stripe looks for in senior engineers. With 5+ years building and operating systems that process billions in transaction volume, Alex has directly solved the class of problems that define Stripe's core engineering challenges.

### Payments & Financial Infrastructure

Alex led the redesign of a payment processing pipeline handling $2B+ in annual transaction volume at TechCorp, reducing p99 latency by 40%. This is direct, verifiable experience with the reliability and performance requirements that Stripe holds its engineers to. The work involved not just backend engineering but deep collaboration with product and compliance teams — the cross-functional ownership model Stripe prizes.

### Distributed Systems at Scale

Architecting multi-region active-active replication for PostgreSQL (achieving 99.99% uptime) demonstrates the fault-tolerance thinking that underpins Stripe's infrastructure. The migration from monolith to event-driven microservices via Kafka is also directly relevant to Stripe's internal platform evolution.

### Developer Experience & API Design

At DataFlow, Alex designed and shipped a developer SDK (Python, Go) adopted by 300+ external developers. This directly maps to Stripe's API-first culture — the instinct to treat the developer experience as a first-class product surface, not an afterthought.

### Technical Leadership

Mentoring 4 junior engineers and introducing an Architecture Decision Record process adopted across 3 teams shows the collaborative, force-multiplying leadership style Stripe values at the senior level.

### Open Source Signal

OpenRateLimiter (1.2K GitHub stars) and PGMigrate (used in production by 50+ companies) demonstrate applied craftsmanship and the ability to build tools that other engineers trust with critical workloads. Both projects are highly relevant to Stripe's infrastructure domain.

### Summary Fit Assessment

Alex Chen is a compelling match for this role. The payments background is rare and directly applicable, the distributed systems depth is exactly what Stripe's infrastructure demands, and the leadership track record shows readiness to operate at Stripe's senior engineering bar.

gaps.job_requirement: React or modern frontend framework experience
gaps.question_for_candidate: Do you have any recent hands-on React experience beyond what's listed on your resume?
gaps.context: The role has a frontend component. React is listed in your skills but not highlighted in recent roles.

mock-tailoring-2.title: Software Engineer
mock-tailoring-2.generated_output:
## Why Alex Chen is a Fit for Software Engineer at Linear

Alex Chen's background in full-stack product engineering and developer tooling aligns well with Linear's engineering culture — particularly the emphasis on API design, TypeScript, and performance-conscious frontend work. The match is solid in several areas, with some gaps worth discussing.

### TypeScript & Full-Stack Engineering

Alex has shipped TypeScript/Node.js at Startup Labs (migrating a PHP codebase and improving test coverage from 12% to 78%) and has TypeScript listed as a core skill. This maps directly to Linear's TypeScript-first stack.

### API Design & Developer Experience

The developer SDK at DataFlow (used by 300+ external developers) demonstrates strong API design instincts — Linear values this given their public API is a first-class product.

### PostgreSQL

Alex's PGMigrate project and extensive PostgreSQL experience aligns directly with Linear's data layer.

### Gaps to Discuss

The role has a meaningful React/frontend component. Alex has React listed as a skill but it doesn't feature prominently in recent work history — primarily backend-focused. Familiarity with Linear's product space (project management tooling, issue trackers) isn't evident in the profile but could be addressed in conversation.

gaps.job_requirement: Strong React and frontend component experience
gaps.question_for_candidate: Can you share examples of React work beyond Startup Labs? Any side projects or recent frontend features?
gaps.context: Alex lists React as a skill but recent roles are backend-focused. The Linear role has significant frontend responsibilities.

gaps.job_requirement: Experience with collaborative productivity or project management tooling
gaps.question_for_candidate: Have you worked on tools used for team collaboration, issue tracking, or project coordination?
gaps.context: Linear builds project management software. Familiarity with the problem space would strengthen the application.

gaps.question_for_candidate: Have you worked with GraphQL APIs, either building or consuming them?
gaps.context: Linear's API is GraphQL-based. No GraphQL experience is listed in Alex's profile.

mock-tailoring-3.title: Staff Engineer
mock-tailoring-3.generated_output:
## Alex Chen — Staff Engineer at Vercel: Fit Assessment

This role asks for a Staff Engineer with deep experience in technical leadership, cross-team architecture, and edge/CDN infrastructure. Alex Chen has a strong backend and distributed systems foundation, but this role skews heavily toward leadership scope, Next.js ecosystem depth, and edge infrastructure — areas where the profile is thinner.

### What Transfers Well

Alex's distributed systems background (multi-region PostgreSQL replication, Kafka-based microservices) speaks to the infrastructure complexity Vercel operates at. The mentorship track record (4 junior engineers, ADR process adoption) demonstrates some leadership influence.

### Significant Gaps

The role requires staff-level scope: driving architectural direction across multiple teams, owning the technical roadmap for edge compute, and influencing engineering org-wide decisions. Alex's profile shows strong individual contributor output but the cross-team, staff-scope leadership signal is limited.

Vercel's core stack is deeply Next.js-centric. Alex's frontend experience is limited (React listed as a skill, used at Startup Labs) and there's no evidence of familiarity with Next.js, edge runtimes, or CDN infrastructure.

8+ years of experience is required. Alex has approximately 7 years based on the timeline shown.

### Recommendation

Alex would be a strong mid-senior backend candidate at Vercel, but this specific Staff Engineer role represents a stretch. The infrastructure intuition is there; the staff-level cross-org leadership and edge/CDN domain expertise would need to be demonstrated in the application and interviews.

gaps.question_for_candidate: Your timeline shows ~7 years. Do you have earlier experience not listed on your resume?
gaps.context: The role requires 8+ years. Alex appears to have approximately 7 based on the timeline.

gaps.job_requirement: Staff-level technical leadership across multiple engineering teams
gaps.question_for_candidate: Can you describe a situation where you drove a technical initiative that spanned multiple teams or organizational units?
gaps.context: Alex's ADR process and mentoring show some leadership influence, but staff-scope cross-org leadership is not clearly evidenced.

gaps.job_requirement: Deep Next.js or edge runtime expertise
gaps.question_for_candidate: Do you have experience with Next.js, edge runtimes (Deno, Cloudflare Workers), or CDN infrastructure?
gaps.context: No Next.js or edge runtime experience is listed. Vercel's core product is Next.js.

gaps.job_requirement: Experience designing CDN or edge compute architecture
gaps.question_for_candidate: Have you worked on caching layers, CDN configuration, or latency-sensitive globally distributed compute?
gaps.context: No CDN or edge compute experience is listed in Alex's profile.
